rulings.Case Title: DAVID BRYAN VS. U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE FOR J.P. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 13, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE FOR J.P. MORGAN ALTERNATIVE LOAN TRUST 2007-A2'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff failed to allege tender or valid exception to prejudice caused by foreclosure imperfections as ordered in prior ruling. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOAO CARLOS MARQUES et al VS. MAUREEN C. O'NEILL, INDIVIDUALLY AND AS TRUSTEE OF et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation Against Maureen O'Neill
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 13, 2013, line 2. PLAINTIFFS JOAO MARQUES and VITORIO CAVAZZINI'S Motion For Entry Of Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation Against Maureen O'Neill Grant $27,000 plus interest, attorney fees, and costs totalling $660. No Evidence the $25,000 was calculated to be paid and received by June 20, 2012 by plaintiff. Repairs due May 24, 2012. Door shall be installed within 30 days. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HOWARD WESTON VS. TOMMY K ABIB et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 13, 2013, line 3. PLAINTIFF HOWARD WESTON TRUSTEE OF THE HOWARD WESTON, 1981 LIVING TRUST'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE PRAYER FOR ATTORNEY FEES FROM DEFENDANT TOMMY K. ABIB aka KHALID ABIB'S ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT DENY - Question of fact re applicability of CC 827 re modification of lien re attorney fees. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID ARAKELIAN VS. WELLS FARGO et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 13, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Off calendar, failed to comply with SFLR 2.6C. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SRI JUJARE VS. ALEXANDRA MOARI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, February 13, 2013, line 5. DEFENDANT ALEXANDRA MOARI'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And First Amended Complaint DENY - Plaintiff properly served at premises rented as residential. = (501/REQ)
